registry.learning: Squee cleared the relevant-opponent probe and then beat deck_607 in two completed equal gates. The seed42 rerun preserved the baseline at 55.56% while Squee climbed to 77.78%, and the harsher seed99 gate still left Squee ahead while doubling miracle and topdeck event frequency over the baseline. This is the first tested swap that has actually dethroned deck_607 on repeated real-opponent evidence.
registry.result: scoped probe 3W/0L/0S; equal gate rerun seed42 7W/1L/1S vs deck_607 5W/4L/0S; equal gate seed99 2W/7L/0S vs deck_607 1W/8L/0S
